holdings.name: NHAI 7.11% 2031
holdings.description: National Highways Authority of India AAA-rated bond maturing 2031. NHAI bonds backed by Government of India guarantee. Fund National Highway development — 10,000+ km/year target. Zero default risk for all practical purposes.

holdings.name: Power Finance Corporation 2031
holdings.description: PFC (rated AAA by CRISIL & ICRA) bond maturing 2031. PFC lends to power sector projects — generation, transmission and distribution. Backed by Ministry of Power; part of India's power sector infrastructure financing.

holdings.name: IRFC 7.00% 2031
holdings.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation bond maturing 2031. IRFC borrows from markets and on-lends to Indian Railways at a spread — zero credit risk as it lends to sovereign. AAA-rated; core holding in target maturity bond ETFs.

holdings.name: REC Limited 2031
holdings.description: REC Limited (formerly Rural Electrification Corporation) AAA-rated bond. Funds power infrastructure lending — generation, transmission, rural electrification. Systemic importance ensures full government backing.

holdings.name: NTPC Ltd 2031
holdings.description: NTPC Ltd AAA-rated bond maturing 2031. India's largest power generator. Bond proceeds fund new thermal and renewable energy capacity addition. Maharatna PSU; guaranteed dividend payouts reinforce credit quality.

holdings.name: NABARD 2031
holdings.description: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) AAA bond. India's apex agricultural development bank. Funds rural credit, irrigation and cooperative bank refinancing. Backed by RBI + Government equity; quasi-sovereign issuer.

holdings.name: Cash & Liquid Assets
holdings.description: Residual cash and near-maturity bonds to manage flows as constituent bonds approach April 2031 target maturity date.
